product_description: DeltaMath is an online educational platform designed to provide practice and mastery in mathematics through a wide range of interactive problems and immediate feedback for students from lower elementary through 12th grade. The platform offers customizable assignments, auto-grading, and content aligned with Common Core standards.

vendor_resources.justification: The page is titled 'Accessibility Statement' and details conformance to WCAG 2.2, screen reader support, keyboard navigation, alt text for images, Braille printouts, video captioning, and high-contrast mode.
